outcome: EVE UI now presents Evolution supporting data as user-facing product context, with AI-session visibility based on recorded artifacts and provider discovery.

added.description: Verification, decisions, risks, implementation, relationships, and AI sessions open as readable detail pages instead of raw JSON shortcuts
AI session views show Codex, Claude Code, OpenCode, and Pi source support, searched roots, transcript availability, and capture commands
Attached transcripts can display event/message preview counts and local matching source candidates

fixed.description: Main EVE UI buttons no longer route users to raw JSON as the primary experience

verification.reference: npm run build; npm test; go test ./...; Playwright screenshot smoke test
